title: Pack of 3 Non-Stick Springform Round Cake Tins for Baking 18cm, 22cm & 26cm
features: A useful addition to any kitchen
description: Product Description Non-Stick Coating Each tin is protected with a non-stick coating to ensure that your cakes are released from their tins with a clean and professional finish. The non-stick coating makes these tins perfect for delicate cakes. The non-stick coating also ensures that your tins are super easy to clean. Stackable design! Due to their nesting sizes, the cake tins are ideal for space saving storage. They simply stack into one another and can be kept together in your cupboards. Three-Piece Spring Form Cake Tin Set Perfect for every occasion! This set of three is perfect if you are creating a three-tiered wedding cake, birthday cake or a cake for any other special occasion! Surprise your guests and bake like a chef! Small size - 18.5cm in diameter Medium size - 22.5cm in diameter Large size - 26cm in diameter Each tin is 7.5cm deep Our mission at YöL Our mission at YöL is to provide you with the highest quality products at the most competitive prices available. We strive to deliver the highest quality service possible whilst making your experience shopping with YöL one that you will want to have over and over again.
